title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bayer India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Bayer India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India Capital India:
Bayer India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
